query:
SHOW VARIABLES LIKE 'character_set%';
SHOW VARIABLES LIKE 'collation%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PycK9Y631tLhJa.0110aa12e67a --database PdcDVQRp8zC2FzsyWBWptW --execute SHOW VARIABLES LIKE 'character_set%';
SHOW VARIABLES LIKE 'collation%';
stdout:
Variable_name	Value
character_set_client	utf8mb4
character_set_connection	utf8mb4
character_set_database	utf8mb4
character_set_filesystem	binary
character_set_results	utf8mb4
character_set_server	utf8mb4
character_set_system	utf8
character_sets_dir	/usr/local/mysql-5.6.25-osx10.8-x86_64/share/charsets/
Variable_name	Value
collation_connection	utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci
collation_database	utf8mb4_unicode_ci
collation_server	utf8mb4_bin
